ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jul-08-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Mar-26-2020 Continued To Jul-08-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dylan Recht for Neil Mendelson (Petitioner).

The Court raises the question of whether it is appropriate to set up separate trusts for each of the Heirs, stated that it is inclined to think that it is, raised the issue of how to distribute 2308 Polk Street, noted that will tells about 2300 Polk Street and that it doesn't mention 2308, but the will does tell how to handle the residue. Mr. Recht stated that there is a scrivener's error on the will and that it is one building that is transferred by one deed. The Court noted that the legal description is different and that it adds a B to it. Mr. Recht referred to page 2 item B of the will, stated that 2316 Polk Street isn't owned by the Decedent, that it should have been 2308 Polk and that the Decedent only owns two pieces of property. Mr. Recht also stated that the issue is addressed in the petition on pages 6 and 7, that no one objects and that all parties agree on this outcome. The First and Final Account and Report of Executor, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-04-2019 Continued To Sep-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
